body.u: I started work at 16 ½ as an apprentice mechanic in a local garage. During this time I spent a lot of time making money by repairing cars and selling them myself. I also got a car, it had lots of room to move, espeacilyespecially in the back. When I was nineteen after finishing my apprenticeship I joined the merchant Navy as a Deckhand on my first ship, the Dragon, I only went to France and Rotterdam. It was my 20th {illegible} before I got very far. I went to America after a rough trip over. At 25 I left the Navy and started to look for a job on land, but there was a shortage jobs so I signed on the dole drawing 25 quid a week. Eventually I got another job in a garage again as head mechanic. I also got myself a garage in which I could do repairs {illegible} jobs etc. In the first year I sold about 20 cars and made around £5,000 I did this for around 5 years and made between 30 and 40 grand then I bought a
